item.title: 5 Romance Books That Subvert Common Tropes
item.description: These romance books subvert romance novel tropes by playing around with reader expectations and creating unique story elements.

item.title: 6 Manga and Manwha Series for Romantasy Readers
item.description: Romantasy themes have long been a staple of manga and manhwa. Here are six series perfect for romantasy readers.

item.title: A Reader’s Guide to Freida McFadden
item.description: Freida McFadden's books are everywhere. But who is the author? Where and how did she begin her writing career?
